scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n api,web "npm run start:api" "npm run start:web"
scripts.start:api: npm run prisma:deploy --prefix backend && npm run prisma:seed --prefix backend && npm run start --prefix backend
scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && cp -n .env.example .env 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
